hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Isan Golf & Adventure Hotel in Udon Thani offers family rooms with garden views, private bathrooms, and modern amenities. Each room includes air-conditioning, a work desk, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy an infinity swimming pool, sun terrace, open-air bath, and a lush garden. Additional facilities include a fitness centre, yoga classes, and free bicycles.
Dining Experience: The on-site restaurant serves Thai cuisine with brunch, lunch, dinner, and high tea. Breakfast options include continental, American, and full English/Irish.
Convenient Location: Located 26 km from Udon Thani Airport, the hotel is near attractions such as Central Plaza Udon Thani (23 km) and Udon Thani Railway Station (22 km). Free on-site parking is available.
